title: avenula cycladum
intro: Avenula cycladum, also known as Wood Meadow-grass or Wood Melic Grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Avenula cycladum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
